page_metadata.biotools__summary: DeepG4 is a deep learning model developed to predict the probability of DNA sequences to form active G-Guadruplexes (found both in vitro and in vivo). DeepG4 is built in keras+tensorflow and is wrapped in an R package.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DeepG4 is a deep learning model developed to predict the probability of DNA sequences to form active G-Guadruplexes (found both in vitro and in vivo). DeepG4 is built in keras+tensorflow and is wrapped in an R package.
